creator: namor@hemio.de
text:
Sorry for the delay.

I would love to say "okay" to your commit, but  I don't really know
what that test user is supposed to do on 10-CURRENT. It does not exist
on 9.2. Also, the recent changes (10-BETA1 throwing out most of ATF
and _atf user) let me wonder if the patch is still needed/useful.

What is the "test" user supposed to do in the first place?

I cannot find anything about it in the FreeBSD wiki nor
are the EuroBSDCan 2013 talks online yet, where you might
have said something about this during your talk. Is there
any official information available which mentions the tests
user?

On Fri, Oct 11, 2013 at 02:00:08AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/atf,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/182892 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182892
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
